      BlockExecutionPO(InitConfig initConfig, BlockContract contract, ProofObligationVars symbExecVars, Goal initiatingGoal, ExecutionContext context, Services services)
      To be used only for auxiliary proofs where the services object of the actual proof has to be used instead of the initial services form the InitConfig.
